name: Hanover Bancorp, Inc. /MD
business: Hanover Bancorp, Inc. is a bank holding company that provides commercial and consumer banking services through its subsidiary Hanover Community Bank. The bank offers loan products including residential mortgages, commercial real estate loans, commercial and industrial loans, and SBA loans, as well as deposit products to individuals, businesses, and municipalities.

exposures.sentence: Our one- to four-family residential mortgage segment has a particular niche focus on non-conforming loans, primarily secured by owner-occupied and investment properties.
As of December 31, 2025, approximately $1.8 billion, or 92%, of our total loan portfolio was secured by real estate, almost all of which is located in our primary lending market.
During the fourth calendar quarter of 2023, we began offering business banking services to the legal, licensed cannabis industry, initially in New York state.
Our SBA loans are secured by commercial real estate and/or business assets. We offer mostly SBA 7(a) variable-rate loans.

catalysts.event: Temporary office in Riverhead operational by end of first quarter 2026
catalysts.sentence: The Company expects that a temporary office location in Riverhead will be operational by the end of the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Full-service branch opening in downtown Riverhead, NY
catalysts.sentence: Subject to regulatory approvals, the Bank expects to open the branch in late 2026.
